- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.

[User question]
Quick question — what is the Aurelia Care Plan?

The **Aurelia Care Plan** is a **prepaid maintenance plan** that covers **all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km**, whichever comes first. It is also **transferable with the car** and can be **purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership**. *(Source: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance)*

If you’d like, I can also help with service intervals or explain how to arrange servicing through your preferred Aurelia channel.

One more thing — is the Aurelia Eterna a good choice for me?

The Aurelia Eterna could be an excellent choice if you’re looking for Aurelia’s most progressive and serene grand luxury experience.

From the model range information, the Eterna is Aurelia’s electric flagship saloon, offering:

- Dual-motor all-electric power with 700 hp
- Up to 620 km WLTP range
- 350 kW fast charging, with 10–80% in about 22 minutes

- Electric driving with strong performance
- Refined long-distance comfort
- A chauffeur-oriented or rear-passenger-focused interior

- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before production begins; once production starts it becomes non-refundable.

To secure an Aurelia build slot, a **refundable commissioning deposit of 10%** is required (**Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery**).

If you’d like, I can also outline when that deposit remains refundable and how the order timeline works.
